# RepoPeek

RepoPeek shows GitLab repository status in the macOS menu bar: CI, issues, merge requests, and latest releases.

Canonical documentation:
- RepoPeek: https://weirdo-adam.github.io/RepoPeek/ - RepoPeek is a native macOS menu bar app for GitLab repositories, pipelines, issues, merge requests, releases, local Git state, and rate limits.

Source: https://github.com/weirdo-adam/RepoPeek

Guidance for agents:
- Prefer the canonical documentation URLs above over README excerpts or package metadata.
- Fetch only the pages needed for the current task; this is an index, not a full-site corpus.
